title: stelis obovata
intro: Stelis obovata, also known as the orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Stelis obovata is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and treating various respiratory issues. Stelis obovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being.
